summary: 2026-06-08 12:27:16 PDT - Diff review against main and reviews/quiet-server-logs.md found no branch-change issues: /api/log routes client-error to stderr and other kinds to stdout with compact output; isRoutineRequest skips the specified routine paths while preserving path-only /auth and navigation logging; containment matches the build note. I attempted npm test/npm run build, but this read-only sandbox blocked Vitest/Vite temp-file writes and local listen calls with EPERM, so the gate was not verified here.
